findings: New-user IPC onboarding present in README showing filesystem bus and atomic mv flow
CLI-agnostic adoption clear with --agent-cmd examples for Claude Code and Aider
Setup docs inconsistent: README creates queue,claimed,results,logs but SKILL depends on pids/ too
No explicit broadcast pattern documented - only queue-based bus plus logs/PIDs
Installation path inconsistency: README uses ~/.copilot/..., SKILL checklist says ~/.stampede/agents/
